description_long: This compact pickup truck features a bright red cab with a large, slightly curved windshield and two side mirrors, giving it a modern and utilitarian appearance. The cargo bed is a deep, open rectangular tray in dark gray, suitable for transporting goods or equipment, and is supported by a robust chassis. The front fascia includes a wide grille and integrated headlights, both rendered in white, while the wheels are black with visible treads for urban and light off-road use. The cab appears to have two doors, with blacked-out windows and a simple, functional design. The rear view reveals the open cargo bed and taillights integrated into the lower bumper. The overall design is practical, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation, making it ideal for urban delivery or utility tasks.
description: A compact red pickup truck with a dark gray open cargo bed, black wheels, and a simple, modern cab design. It is practical and well-suited for urban transport or utility work.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the open cargo bed, rear window, and taillights integrated into the lower bumper.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the red cab, black wheels, and the full length of the dark gray cargo bed.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the wide windshield, white grille, headlights, and the symmetrical design of the cab.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the cab, wheels, and cargo bed, with the exhaust pipe visible underneath.
